What We Offer

Our Core Services

Executive & VVIP Chauffeur Services

Premium chauffeur-driven mobility for diplomats, executives, and high-profile clients. Discreet, punctual, and impeccably professional.

Corporate Driver Outsourcing

Supply trained, certified, and vetted professional drivers to organizations on short-term or long-term contracts.

Elite Driver Training & Certification

Our 5-day intensive program produces certified drivers across three tiers: ECCD, EECC, and ETMS. Defensive driving, VIP protocol, and more.

Executive Mobility & Airport Transfers

Seamless airport pickups and executive point-to-point transfers with real-time coordination and luxury fleet standards.

Tours, Travel & Road Expeditions

Custom-curated travel experiences across Kenya and East Africa. From wildlife safaris to corporate retreats.

5

Days of intensive Elite Driver Training

About Us

Nairobi's Standard for Executive Transport

Bright Elite Tours and Travels is a subsidiary of Future Bright Ventures Ltd, built to deliver premium professional mobility and executive transport solutions across Kenya and East Africa. We serve corporates, NGOs, embassies, government agencies, and high-net-worth individuals who demand discretion, safety, and excellence.

Our Core Values

DisciplineIntegrityProfessionalismSafetyExcellence

Certification Framework

ECCD — Elite Certified Corporate Driver

Foundation-level certification for corporate fleet readiness.

EECC — Elite Executive Chauffeur Certification

Advanced certification for executive and VIP-level service.

ETMS — Elite Tactical Mobility Specialist

Elite tier for high-risk, diplomatic, and tactical transport.
